title: Localize core medium-risk set into priority language #1 (safety-accuracy reviewed)
context: Localizing the core medium-risk content set (handwashing through surface disinfection) into the first priority non-English language (to be confirmed by the securing partner) is the primary M3 deliverable. Translations must be safety-accuracy reviewed — not just fluent — because a fluent but inaccurate translation of a WASH how-to can cause harm. The priority language is determined by partner context; this task is initiated once the i18n framework (i18n-019) is ready and the full medium-risk set (content-012) is complete.
objective: Translate the complete core medium-risk WASH content set (handwashing, safe water storage, boiling, SODIS/filtration/flocculation method-level, latrine/sanitation, safe disposal of child feces, MHH, household surface disinfection) into priority language #1, with every translation reviewed by a competent speaker who also checks safety accuracy (numbers, step order, key terms) and not just fluency.
acceptanceCriteria: All medium-risk WashUnit content (content-006 through content-012) is translated into priority language #1 and committed as locale catalog entries conforming to the i18n framework (i18n-019)
Every translation is reviewed by a competent speaker of priority language #1 who verifies both fluency and safety accuracy (numbers, step order, key protective-behavior terms, disclaimer text)
Safety-accuracy review is documented: a PR-tied review-log entry records which content was reviewed, by whom, and that both fluency and safety accuracy were checked
Translated disclaimer text preserves the 'informational, not a substitute for professional care' framing in the target language
Source attribution is preserved in the translated output (sources are still cited, attribution language is translated)

Build-time i18n completeness check passes for priority language #1 (no missing required strings); no verbatim copied source text; reviewed and approved by a translation+safety reviewer distinct from the translator
output: A committed locale catalog for priority language #1 covering all core medium-risk content, with documented safety-accuracy review and PR-tied review-log entries.
